productDisplayName: Clarks Men Atl Three Ebony Leather Brown Sandals
description: These two-bar unstructured leather floaters from clarks have a sporty and trail-inspired look. Lightweight, flexible and heavily breathable, it& rsquo s a perfect addition to your collection of casual footwear. Upper Two leather straps with Velcro adjustment closures for absolute customizable comfort and to offer easy wear and removal Perforated lining and cushioned footbed with mesh panels on the sides of straps for absolute ventilation Outsole Durable and flexible rubber outsole with curved mid arch periphery for ergonomic comfort Textured and grooved lugs strategically placed in high-wear areas for durability Suction point style lugs along the outsole for easy air movement offering perfect traction Sandal care Clean the leather with a leather brush Do not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
